---
title: "Introduction to ArcGIS"
source: "Workshop Material"
author: "Xan Wedel"
institution: "University of Kansas"
competency: [Data Wrangling, Programming Skills]
tech-lang: [ArcGIS]
main-format: [Code, Data, PPT Slide]
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

This workshop provides an overview of how to use ArcGIS software and a few applied practical applications. The examples include data from the U.S. Census Bureau's American Community Survey (ACS) data and a free public version of ArcGIS online.

## Module Materials

You can access the material [here](https://github.com/KansasData/Module/tree/main/ku_Wedel_Intro_ArcGIS)

This Material is under the [CC BY-ND license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nd/4.0/deed.en)
